_note: Lead-magnet registry. Each entry generates an opt-in page at /free/<slug>/ that captures an email to the owned lead DB, fires the Lead Magnet conversion (Google + X), then delivers the PDF from /dl/. Edit here, run build_magnets.py, deploy. 'file' is the existing PDF in site/dl/.
